release_notes: V1.1.4: Detailed Error Reporting for Easy Debugging.
features: Comprehensive error report dialog with device info
One-tap copy to clipboard for easy sharing
Memory status, scan statistics, and failure analysis
fixes: Users can now easily send detailed error reports to developer
Error reports include device info, memory status, and diagnostics
Copy button for quick error report sharing
Beautiful error dialog with selectable text
All scan failures now show actionable error information
